title: Cozy Gooey Algerian Sevaiiya Stir-fry
description: This keto-friendly umami and gooey dish features sevaiiya that are caramelized to perfection for a cozy algerian flavor.

ingredients.name: Pinch salt
ingredients.notes: kosher or sea salt can be used

instructions: Mix almond flour, garlic powder, nutritional yeast, and a pinch of salt in a small bowl.
Add chicken broth to the mixture until it forms a smooth paste. Drizzle olive oil over the top of the paste to prevent clumping.
Pour the mixture evenly onto the sevaiiya, tossing gently to coat thoroughly.
Transfer coated sevaiiya to an oven-safe baking dish and bake for 10 minutes or until golden brown and bubbly on top.
Garnish with fresh parsley if desired. Serve hot as a side or main course.
Let it cool slightly before serving to avoid burning your tongue.
